properties.body:
WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
URUGUAY.
1. SEISMIC SURVEY BY M/V WESTERN REGENT TOWING TEN
   8800 METER LONG CABLES:
   A. 25 DEC ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      36-18.87S 051-28.70W AND 35-35.42S 052-11.23W.
   B. 25 AND 26 DEC ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      35-31.48S 052-04.00W AND 36-14.88S 051-21.47W.
   EIGHT MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 3327/13.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 27 DEC 13.
